title: m0a-llmproxy — STAND-IN mapper measurement: a pinned blind cross-vendor LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol) judges each of the 300 pinned M0a annotation-sample mappings correct/incorrect under kernel-naive per-stratum rendering, yielding LLM-proxy precision/recall that REPLACE the 2026-07-07 non-blind agent-judged provisionals (strict P 0.82 / strict R 0.8865) while remaining NOT the pre-registered human pass; deranged-gloss probe, retest floor, agreement-with-agent reported-only diagnostic, zero GPU; the human pass over mapper/m0/annotation-sample.jsonl remains the sole gold standard and the only discharger of the M0a pre-registration
hypotheses: H-M0AP-MEASURE (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, shown ONLY blind per-stratum renderings (passage + marked token + gloss-rendered proposed sense(s); no urns, no stratum labels, no mention of a mapping system), completes the M0a annotation task at instrument-valid coverage, yielding proxy P/R under the pinned published estimator. PASS means exactly 'a valid blind-LLM proxy measurement exists' — never a mapper-quality endorsement (the M0a pre-registration is a measurement with no kill bar, and the proxy cannot invent one)

H-M0AP-STYLE (instrument alternative, controlled): high 'correct' rates could be gloss-endorsement leniency rather than sense judgment; the deranged-gloss probe (another target's gloss on the same token/context; correct answer 'incorrect' by construction) bounds the crude form — false-endorsement >= 0.30 invalidates the instrument, never reads as a hypothesis outcome

H-M0AP-AGENT-DELTA (disclosed diagnostic, never verdict-bearing): per-stratum raw agreement between the blind proxy labels and the 2026-07-07 non-blind project-contexted agent labels; divergence measures blindness + judge-family effects JOINTLY and attributes nothing — attribution belongs to the human pass on the same items

scale_rungs: none (annotation adjudication only; no host model; no GPU)

independent_vars.name: judge_role
levels: judge-m1p (GPT-5.6-Sol, sole proxy annotator; CROSS-VENDOR load-bearing twice: the comparator labels being replaced are Claude-family work, and the mapper + glosses + prior judging are Claude-family work-products)

independent_vars.name: item_set
levels: 300 pinned annotation-sample items (concept 100 / prime 100 / abstain 50 / none 50), per-stratum blind renderings, order seed-pinned m0alp/1|judge-m1p|20260710
deranged-gloss probe (40: 20 concept + 20 prime; instrument control; never in labels or P/R)
retest duplicates (30; stability floor; never in labels)

dependent_vars.name: precision_strict_proxy
dependent_vars.definition: stratum-population-weighted share of labelled concept/prime items judged 'correct' (unclear counted incorrect), the published M0a estimator verbatim with proxy labels; populations concept 117563 / prime 504500 pinned from the published report

dependent_vars.name: precision_lenient_proxy
dependent_vars.definition: same with unclear counted correct (the published strict/lenient pair, both always reported together)

dependent_vars.name: recall_strict_proxy
dependent_vars.definition: correct-mapped mass / (correct-mapped mass + abstain-miss mass + none-miss mass), populations abstain 181388 / none 2958417, the published estimator verbatim with proxy labels; reported with recall_lower_bound95 (none-miss at its Clopper-Pearson 95% upper bound over the observed none-stratum sample — the pre-existing thin-coverage discipline carried over UNCHANGED)

dependent_vars.name: probe_false_endorse_rate
dependent_vars.definition: share of labelled probe items judged 'correct' where 'incorrect' is correct by construction; point >= 0.30 invalidates the judge instrument

dependent_vars.name: agent_agreement_by_stratum
dependent_vars.definition: REPORTED-ONLY: per-stratum raw agreement of proxy labels with the 2026-07-07 non-blind agent labels; a blindness+family joint diagnostic, never validation, never gated

dependent_vars.name: retest_agreement
dependent_vars.definition: raw agreement over 30 seed-pinned duplicates; < 0.80 invalidates; pass direction validates nothing

arms_mandatory_baselines: deranged-gloss probe (the judge-level content-scramble control, house shuffled-kernel idiom: per-stratum Sattolo cycle over distinct sampled targets => the proposed sense is another target's gloss, correct answer 'incorrect' by construction; near-synonym collision risk disclosed; measures gloss-endorsement leniency = the channel that would fabricate high proxy precision)

agent-judgments comparator (REPORTED-ONLY: the 2026-07-07 non-blind Claude-family agent labels, pinned read-only; per-stratum raw agreement is a blindness+family joint diagnostic and NEVER validation in either direction)
kernel-as-text null and host-model arms: NOT APPLICABLE by design — no host model, no GPU cell; this record measures an annotation instrument over pinned mapper outputs, not model lift

n_planned.adjudication: judge-m1p (gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low; truthstyle judges-invocation section-4.1 form) labels all 300 items in seed-pinned order, then 40 probes (m0alp/1|probe|20260710), then 30 retests; per-item stateless hardened calls with per-stratum server-side output schemas (concept/prime: correct/incorrect/unclear; abstain: candidate number or none; none: inventory entry or none); first-valid-answer-final, <= 3 content attempts then no-label; preflight on 2 pinned calibration items must pass first-attempt; blinding grep audit per call (kernel/nsm/urn:/mapper) — any hit aborts; the in-session Agent-tool sub-agent form is FORBIDDEN (project-context injection)
n_planned.rendering: per-stratum blind renderings per the prereg S2: concept/prime items carry the mapped target's gloss WITHOUT any urn/id; abstain items carry the candidate glosses as a numbered list; none items carry the full pinned kernel-v0 surface inventory (54 concept lemmas + 65 prime exponents, one-line senses, byte-identical across items); judgment criteria carried on the sheet verbatim from the stated M0a criteria (sense-in-context only; explication adequacy out of scope; light-verb/phrasal/idiomatic/auxiliary divergent uses = incorrect; unclear = genuinely contestable)
n_planned.instrument_gates: adjudication_valid: preflight_pass AND n_labelled >= 285/300 AND >= 90 per 100-item stratum AND >= 45 per 50-item stratum AND retest agreement >= 0.80. probe_valid: n_probe_labelled >= 36/40 AND probe false-endorsement point-rate < 0.30. Failures are INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS
n_planned.stage_discipline: freeze BEFORE any judge call; stage judge-invocation spec + per-stratum templates + schemas + inventory rendering + probe manifest + calibration items -> ops amendment pins them -> preflight -> 300 real items -> 40 probes -> 30 retests -> assemble data/m0a-judgments-llmproxy -> corpus-pin ops amendment -> log-append the single final-phase record -> verdict-gen -> cross-vendor audit (family overlap with the judge DISCLOSED; mechanical recomputation from pinned bytes) -> Fable interpretive assessment

assumptions.claim: stand-in rationale: the M0a pre-registration (docs/poc-design.md Phase M) names HUMAN annotation; the current provisional P/R were produced by a NON-BLIND, project-contexted Claude-family agent and are stamped PROVISIONAL in every artifact; the maintainer requested blind-LLM stand-ins (2026-07-10); this proxy upgrades blindness and author-family independence ONLY, never species-of-judge; registered as ASM-0550 and ASM-0540

judge choice: cross-vendor is load-bearing — a Claude-family judge would correlate with the very comparator the agreement diagnostic measures against, and the mapper/glosses/prior-judging are Claude-family work-products; gpt-5.6-sol effort low under npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1 is the established pinned mechanism; registered as ASM-0540 and ASM-0551
rendering contract: per-stratum blind renderings from pinned bytes only (glosses in place of urns; candidate gloss lists; the full surface inventory for the none stratum); registered as ASM-0541

estimator reuse: precision/recall formulas, stratum populations, strict/lenient duality and the none-stratum Clopper-Pearson lower-bound discipline are reused EXACTLY from the published compute-pr.py + m0a-report.json; the none-stratum thinness (50 items over 2.96M tokens = 78% of token mass) carries over UNCHANGED and is not fixed by this proxy; registered as ASM-0542

agreement-with-agent reading: proxy-vs-agent divergence measures blindness + judge-family effects jointly and is unattributable within this design; registered as ASM-0543, load_bearing false, resolved by the human pass over the same 300 items

probe construction: per-stratum Sattolo derangement over distinct sampled targets gives correct-answer-'incorrect' items by construction, with disclosed near-synonym collision risk; registered as ASM-0544

coverage disclosure (mandatory): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; M0a itself is pre-registered as a FAVOURABLE-CASE design (TinyStories' semantically clean domain, stated verbatim in poc-design.md), and no proxy number extends beyond that slice

nothing here discharges M0a: the human pass over mapper/m0/annotation-sample.jsonl remains the sole gold standard and the only thing that satisfies the pre-registration's 'against human annotation'; the proxy P/R replace the agent-judged provisionals as the programme's PROVISIONAL numbers only, every citation carrying the WEAK-PROXY label; proxy outputs are quarantined from any future human annotator (ASM-0553)

endpoints.test: PASS iff adjudication_valid AND probe_valid — PASS means exactly 'a valid blind-LLM proxy measurement of the M0a quantities exists' and carries the envelope verbatim; the P/R values themselves are MEASUREMENTS of the proxy estimand (LLM-proxy P/R, still not human) reported without any pass/fail bar because the M0a pre-registration has none; no bootstrap, no seeds: deterministic counts + the published closed-form estimator over pinned items

REPORTED: strict/lenient proxy precision (population-weighted, published estimator verbatim) with per-stratum rates and Wilson 95% bounds per stratum (z=1.645, descriptive); replaces the agent-judged 0.82/0.8968 as the programme's provisional precision, WEAK-PROXY-labelled

REPORTED: strict/lenient proxy recall + recall_lower_bound95 (none-miss at Clopper-Pearson 95% upper over the observed none sample); replaces the agent-judged 0.8865/0.8952 (LB95 0.6825) as the programme's provisional recall, WEAK-PROXY-labelled
INSTRUMENT gate, point rule: deranged-gloss probe false-endorsement rate >= 0.30 OR probe coverage < 36/40 => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (gloss-endorsement leniency channel)

REPORTED-ONLY: per-stratum raw agreement with the pinned 2026-07-07 non-blind agent labels + the item-level disagreement list (diagnostic input for the eventual human pass); never gated, never validation
REPORTED-ONLY + consumed by the adjudication gate in its FAIL direction: raw agreement over 30 duplicates; high agreement validates nothing (single judge)

kill_criterion_verbatim: m0a-llmproxy has NO hypothesis kill by design: the M0a pre-registration (docs/poc-design.md Phase M) is a MEASUREMENT with no pass/fail bar, and a stand-in may not invent one — a proxy record that manufactured a mapper-quality gate would be enveloping a decision the human pass was never asked to make. The only kill-shaped rule is instrument validity (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL): preflight failure; n_labelled < 285/300 or any stratum floor missed (>= 90 per 100-item stratum, >= 45 per 50-item stratum); retest raw agreement < 0.80; deranged-gloss probe false-endorsement >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 36/40 (a judge endorsing wrong glosses at >= 0.30 is answering from leniency/style, and its 'correct' labels cannot be read as sense judgments — the channel that would fabricate high proxy precision). Programme reading (non-verdict, envelope clause 6): materially LOW proxy precision or a nonzero none-stratum miss rate is an early warning on the mapper line and warrants escalation before any downstream reuse of mapper outputs.
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE PRE-REGISTERED HUMAN PASS: the M0a human-annotation role is filled by a pinned LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low) because the human annotator is unavailable at run time; the human pass over mapper/m0/annotation-sample.jsonl (300 items, sha256 038604a8d7d0fa160209805374b5c89dd5a044c552d1e0dafe0d2bd028575a2c) remains the sole gold standard and the ONLY thing that discharges the poc-design.md M0a pre-registration ('precision/recall against human annotation'). The proxy P/R ARE one LLM's blind word-sense judgments under gloss rendering — NOT human annotation. They REPLACE the 2026-07-07 agent-judged provisionals (strict P 0.82 / strict R 0.8865, produced by a NON-BLIND, project-contexted, Claude-family agent) as the programme's provisional numbers, upgrading exactly two properties — blindness (kernel-instance-naive context control) and author-family independence (cross-vendor judge) — and upgrading NOTHING else: the judge species is still LLM, and every citation of these numbers must carry the WEAK-PROXY label pending the human pass. Binding weakenings: (1) SINGLE CROSS-VENDOR JUDGE — the estimand is 'GPT-5.x-family blind sense judgment of the mapper's outputs'; family-level leniency or severity moves P/R independent of real mapper quality; the retest floor is stability only. (2) WSD-COMPETENCE GAP — LLM sense judgments approximate human annotation with unproven offsets, concentrated exactly where the agent pass located the error mass (light-verb, phrasal, idiomatic, auxiliary uses); direction unproven (ASM-0543 measures the joint delta, the human pass attributes it). (3) DESIGN LIMITS CARRY OVER UNCHANGED — TinyStories favourable-case domain (pre-registered as such, verbatim), stratum-population reweighting stipulated from the published report (ASM-0542), and the none-stratum thinness (50 items over 2,958,417 tokens = 78% of token mass; recall_lower_bound95 via Clopper-Pearson stands): the proxy fixes NONE of these. (4) LICENSE OF A PASS — PASS means exactly: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM completed the M0a annotation task at instrument-valid coverage with a demonstrated working deranged-gloss control'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550). It does NOT discharge the M0a pre-registration, is NOT a mapper-quality endorsement, does NOT validate the mapper for any downstream experiment whose frozen record names human annotation, and does NOT extend to other corpora, other domains, natural-user distributions, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (5) ASYMMETRIC READING — the named channels (gloss-endorsement leniency, tradition familiarity ASM-0552) plausibly push 'correct' judgments UP, so LOW proxy precision or a nonzero none-miss rate is the more informative outcome (early warning on the mapper line, escalate before downstream reuse); high proxy P/R licenses only continued investment (human annotator sourcing, mapper-line engineering) and never upgrades any claim. (6) Item bytes and the published estimator are byte-identical to the pending human pass's; per-item proxy labels are pinned so the eventual human pass yields a free human-vs-proxy bias measurement AND settles the proxy-vs-agent attribution (ASM-0553, ASM-0543); nothing else carries over.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py
corpus_hashes.m0a-judgments-llmproxy: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:judge-m1p responses + probe responses + labels-proxy + rendered-prompt manifest + summary, pinned by ops amendment after the judge run and before the final-phase record

model_revisions._note: no host models: zero GPU cells in this record
model_revisions.judge-m1p: gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low (truthstyle-2x2 section-4.1 form; re-verify version banner at preflight)

runner_constraints.infra: sequential per-item codex exec calls, concurrency 1
runner_constraints.harness: poc/m0a-llmproxy/judge-invocation.md (mechanical; staged + pinned pre-run; any undecided situation is a BOUNDARY STOP back to the designer, never runner improvisation)
runner_constraints.authorization: maintainer-requested stand-in (2026-07-10): blind-LLM proxies for the outstanding human annotation passes, human-verified later, per the f2b-transfer-llmproxy precedent (ASM-0550); usd_cap 10 sits inside every auto-authorization envelope; budget.maintainer_signoff reserved for Tier-5 records and deliberately absent
